name: technology-source-registry maps node to its canonical nodejs.org api docs seed acquired whole with a path-prefix crawl scope
command: ruby -ryaml -e 'reg = YAML.safe_load(File.read(ENV["CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT"] + "/standards/technology-source-registry.yaml")); e = (reg["technologies"]["node"] || [])[0] or abort("no node entry"); ok = e["source_id"] == "nodejs-api-docs" && e["url"] == "https://nodejs.org/api/" && e["whole_source"] == true && e["tier"] == 1 && e.dig("scope", "strategy") == "path-prefix"; STDERR.puts "node-canonical-seed-registered" if ok; exit(ok ? 0 : 1)'
